description: BYOP (Bring Your Own Pollen) and DevShare developer earnings. Clean = events with parent-pk tracking (api_key_client_id). DevShare = clean events with markup_rate > 0. Legacy = pre-tracking BYOP (migration health only).

panels.title: Clean BYOP — apps with parent-pk tracking

panels.description: Distinct BYOP parent apps (pk_) with at least one billed event in the selected period. Filter: api_key_client_id != ''.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT uniq(api_key_client_id) AS active_apps
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Active apps

panels.description: Distinct developers (parent-pk owners) with at least one billed event. Joined via d1_apikey to recover ownership for the active parent keys.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username),
app_owners AS (
  SELECT id AS app_key_id, user_id
  FROM d1_apikey
  WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_apikey)
)
SELECT uniq(ao.user_id) AS active_devs
FROM generation_event ge
LEFT JOIN app_owners ao ON ge.api_key_client_id = ao.app_key_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Active developers

panels.description: Distinct end-users (BYOP app users) with at least one billed event in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT uniq(user_github_id) AS active_users
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: End users

panels.description: Total billed requests through BYOP apps in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT count() AS requests
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Requests

panels.description: Total Pollen consumed through BYOP apps (total_price = baseline + dev markup credit).

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sum(total_price) AS pollen
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Pollen consumed

panels.description: Share of total platform Pollen (across all sources) flowing through clean BYOP apps.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT sumIf(total_price, api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined') / nullIf(sum(total_price), 0) AS share
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Share of platform ρ

panels.description: Daily BYOP Pollen split by meter: pack (end-user paid) vs tier (subsidy). Pack growth = healthy. Tier growth = subsidy burn.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket}) AS time,
  sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS pack_pollen,
  sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) AS tier_pollen
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily BYOP Pollen — Pack vs Tier

panels.description: Daily counts: BYOP requests, active apps, active end-users. Shows ecosystem activity over time.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username)
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket}) AS time,
  count() AS requests,
  uniq(api_key_client_id) AS apps,
  uniqIf(user_github_id, user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined') AS users
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily BYOP — requests, apps, users

panels.description: Top BYOP apps ranked by Pollen consumed. App name resolved via d1_apikey; falls back to client_id if unsynced. Pack/tier split shows revenue vs subsidy mix per app.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username),
app_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS app_key_id, coalesce(nullIf(name, ''), id) AS app_name, user_id
  FROM d1_apikey
  WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_apikey)
),
dev_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id, github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
)
SELECT
  coalesce(al.app_name, ge.api_key_client_id) AS app,
  coalesce(dl.github_username, '') AS developer,
  sum(ge.total_price) AS total_pollen,
  sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS pack_pollen,
  sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) AS tier_pollen,
  uniqIf(ge.user_github_id, ge.user_github_id != '' AND ge.user_github_id != 'undefined') AS users,
  count() AS requests
FROM generation_event ge
LEFT JOIN app_labels al ON ge.api_key_client_id = al.app_key_id
LEFT JOIN dev_labels dl ON al.user_id = dl.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time)
  AND ge.environment = 'production'
  AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300
  AND ge.total_price > 0
  AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND ge.api_key_client_id != '' AND ge.api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY app, developer
ORDER BY total_pollen DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Top BYOP Apps

panels.description: Top BYOP developers (parent-pk owners) by Pollen consumed across all their apps.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username),
app_owners AS (
  SELECT id AS app_key_id, user_id
  FROM d1_apikey
  WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_apikey)
),
dev_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id, github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
)
SELECT
  coalesce(dl.github_username, ao.user_id, '') AS developer,
  uniq(ge.api_key_client_id) AS apps,
  uniqIf(ge.user_github_id, ge.user_github_id != '' AND ge.user_github_id != 'undefined') AS users,
  count() AS requests,
  sum(ge.total_price) AS total_pollen,
  sumIf(ge.total_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS pack_pollen
FROM generation_event ge
LEFT JOIN app_owners ao ON ge.api_key_client_id = ao.app_key_id
LEFT JOIN dev_labels dl ON ao.user_id = dl.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time)
  AND ge.environment = 'production'
  AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300
  AND ge.total_price > 0
  AND ge.user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
  AND ge.api_key_client_id != '' AND ge.api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY developer
ORDER BY total_pollen DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top BYOP Developers

panels.description: Tier composition of BYOP end-users: how much of their Pollen comes from free-tier subsidy vs paid packs. Pack-heavy traffic is monetized; tier-heavy means BYOP apps are mostly serving free-tier users.

targets.rawSql:
WITH banned_users AS (SELECT github_username FROM d1_user WHERE banned = 1 GROUP BY github_username),
user_day AS (
  SELECT
    toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket}) AS time,
    user_github_id,
    countIf(selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS pack_events,
    countIf(selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) AS tier_events
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND total_price > 0
    AND user_github_username NOT IN (SELECT github_username FROM banned_users)
    AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
    AND user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined'
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
  GROUP BY time, user_github_id
)
SELECT
  time,
  countIf(pack_events > 0) AS pack_users,
  countIf(pack_events = 0 AND tier_events > 0) AS tier_only_users
FROM user_day
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: End-User Tier Composition

panels.description: Developers earning DevShare (markup_rate > 0) in the selected period. DevShare = total_price - dev_price per event.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT uniq(api_key_created_for_user_id) AS earning_devs
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND markup_rate > 0
  AND total_price > dev_price
  AND api_key_created_for_user_id != '' AND api_key_created_for_user_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Earning developers

panels.description: Apps earning DevShare in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT uniq(api_key_client_id) AS earning_apps
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND markup_rate > 0
  AND total_price > dev_price
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Earning apps

panels.description: Total DevShare Pollen credited to developers in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sum(total_price - dev_price) AS pollen_paid
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND markup_rate > 0
  AND total_price > dev_price
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: DevShare Pollen paid

panels.description: DevShare paid out of pack-funded events as a share of total pack revenue. Shows what fraction of paying-user revenue is being redirected to developers.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  sumIf(total_price - dev_price, markup_rate > 0 AND total_price > dev_price AND selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack'))
  / nullIf(sumIf(total_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')), 0) AS devshare_pct_of_pack
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: DevShare / pack revenue

panels.description: Weighted average markup rate across DevShare events. Currently fixed at 25% (MARKUP_PCT in shared/billing/markup.ts).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sum(markup_rate * dev_price) / nullIf(sum(dev_price), 0) AS weighted_markup
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND markup_rate > 0
  AND total_price > dev_price
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Weighted avg markup

panels.description: Active BYOP apps (any billed event) vs apps earning DevShare (markup_rate > 0). The gap is the activation opportunity.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  uniqIf(api_key_client_id, markup_rate > 0 AND total_price > dev_price)
  / nullIf(uniq(api_key_client_id), 0) AS activation_pct
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: DevShare activation

panels.description: Daily DevShare Pollen paid out, split by the meter the spending user paid from. Pack = monetized (revenue redirected). Tier = developer earned from subsidy-funded usage.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket}) AS time,
  sumIf(total_price - dev_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) AS pack_earned,
  sumIf(total_price - dev_price, selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:tier', 'local:tier')) AS tier_earned
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND markup_rate > 0
  AND total_price > dev_price
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Daily DevShare — Pack vs Tier

panels.description: Top earning developers by total DevShare Pollen in the selected period. Earnings = total_price - dev_price.

targets.rawSql:
WITH dev_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id, github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
)
SELECT
  coalesce(dl.github_username, ge.api_key_created_for_user_id) AS developer,
  uniq(ge.api_key_client_id) AS apps,
  count() AS requests,
  sum(ge.total_price - ge.dev_price) AS earned,
  sumIf(ge.total_price - ge.dev_price, ge.selected_meter_slug IN ('v1:meter:pack', 'local:pack')) / nullIf(sum(ge.total_price - ge.dev_price), 0) AS pack_share
FROM generation_event ge
LEFT JOIN dev_labels dl ON ge.api_key_created_for_user_id = dl.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time)
  AND ge.environment = 'production'
  AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300
  AND ge.markup_rate > 0
  AND ge.total_price > ge.dev_price
  AND ge.api_key_created_for_user_id != '' AND ge.api_key_created_for_user_id != 'undefined'
  AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY developer
ORDER BY earned DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top Earning Developers

panels.description: Top earning apps by DevShare Pollen.

targets.rawSql:
WITH app_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS app_key_id, coalesce(nullIf(name, ''), id) AS app_name, user_id
  FROM d1_apikey
  WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_apikey)
),
dev_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id, github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
)
SELECT
  coalesce(al.app_name, ge.api_key_client_id) AS app,
  coalesce(dl.github_username, '') AS developer,
  uniqIf(ge.user_github_id, ge.user_github_id != '' AND ge.user_github_id != 'undefined') AS users,
  count() AS requests,
  sum(ge.total_price - ge.dev_price) AS earned
FROM generation_event ge
LEFT JOIN app_labels al ON ge.api_key_client_id = al.app_key_id
LEFT JOIN dev_labels dl ON al.user_id = dl.user_id
WHERE $__timeFilter(ge.start_time)
  AND ge.environment = 'production'
  AND ge.response_status >= 200 AND ge.response_status < 300
  AND ge.markup_rate > 0
  AND ge.total_price > ge.dev_price
  AND ge.api_key_client_id != '' AND ge.api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
  AND (ge.start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR ge.start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY app, developer
ORDER BY earned DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top Earning Apps

panels.description: BYOP apps active in the period that are NOT earning DevShare (markup_rate = 0). Activation opportunity — these developers have shipped but haven't enabled markup.

targets.rawSql:
WITH app_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS app_key_id, coalesce(nullIf(name, ''), id) AS app_name, user_id
  FROM d1_apikey
  WHERE synced_at = (SELECT max(synced_at) FROM d1_apikey)
),
dev_labels AS (
  SELECT id AS user_id, github_username
  FROM d1_user
  WHERE github_username != '' AND github_username != 'undefined'
),
per_app AS (
  SELECT
    api_key_client_id AS app_key_id,
    max(markup_rate) AS max_markup,
    sum(total_price) AS total_pollen,
    count() AS requests,
    uniqIf(user_github_id, user_github_id != '' AND user_github_id != 'undefined') AS users
  FROM generation_event
  WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
    AND environment = 'production'
    AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
    AND total_price > 0
    AND api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
    AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
  GROUP BY app_key_id
)
SELECT
  coalesce(al.app_name, pa.app_key_id) AS app,
  coalesce(dl.github_username, '') AS developer,
  pa.users AS users,
  pa.requests AS requests,
  pa.total_pollen AS total_pollen,
  pa.total_pollen * 0.25 AS potential_devshare
FROM per_app pa
LEFT JOIN app_labels al ON pa.app_key_id = al.app_key_id
LEFT JOIN dev_labels dl ON al.user_id = dl.user_id
WHERE pa.max_markup = 0
ORDER BY pa.total_pollen DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Eligible But Not Earning — Activation Opportunity

panels.description: BYOP-shaped traffic without parent-pk tracking. Filter: api_key_client_id='' AND (redirect-auth OR hostname-shaped key name). Should trend toward zero as the 0023 backfill matures.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT count() AS legacy_events
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined')
  AND (
    api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth'
    OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%')
  )
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Legacy events

panels.description: Distinct hostnames seen via legacy heuristic (api_key_name LIKE '%.%').

targets.rawSql:
SELECT uniq(api_key_name) AS hostnames
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined')
  AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Legacy hostnames

panels.description: Legacy BYOP Pollen as share of total platform Pollen. Migration-health indicator — should approach zero.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  sumIf(total_price, (api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined') AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%')))
  / nullIf(sum(total_price), 0) AS share
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Legacy share of ρ

panels.description: Pollen via legacy BYOP detection in the selected period.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT sum(total_price) AS pollen
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined')
  AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'))
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))

panels.title: Legacy Pollen

panels.description: Daily legacy BYOP events (without parent-pk tracking). Trend should decline as backfill closes the gap; spikes indicate apps not yet using the new redirect-auth flow.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket}) AS time,
  count() AS legacy_events
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined')
  AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'))
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

panels.title: Legacy BYOP Events — Migration Trend

panels.description: Top hostnames detected via legacy heuristic. These apps need redirect-auth migration to surface in Clean BYOP.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  api_key_name AS hostname,
  count() AS requests,
  sum(total_price) AS pollen
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined')
  AND api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY hostname
ORDER BY pollen DESC
LIMIT 100

panels.title: Top Legacy Hostnames

panels.description: Weekly signal coverage: clean (parent-pk tracked) vs legacy-only (redirect-auth or hostname heuristic without parent-pk). Confirms the 0022/0023 migration is closing the legacy gap.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT
  toStartOfInterval(start_time, INTERVAL ${bucket}) AS time,
  countIf(api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined') AS clean,
  countIf((api_key_client_id = '' OR api_key_client_id = 'undefined') AND (api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth' OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%'))) AS legacy_only
FROM generation_event
WHERE $__timeFilter(start_time)
  AND environment = 'production'
  AND response_status >= 200 AND response_status < 300
  AND total_price > 0
  AND (
    api_key_client_id != '' AND api_key_client_id != 'undefined'
    OR api_key_created_via = 'redirect-auth'
    OR (api_key_type = 'secret' AND api_key_name LIKE '%.%')
  )
  AND (start_time < toDateTime('2025-12-30 16:59:45') OR start_time > toDateTime('2026-01-08 18:19:58'))
GROUP BY time ORDER BY time
